overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through Blackwater Marsh during an overcast, rainy day. The character traverses a dirt path through marshy grasslands and scattered trees, eventually encountering a horse-drawn wagon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marsh grassland with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the marsh grasslands

entered.detail: large oak tree with dense foliage on the left side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the marsh grass
expansive wetlands with tall grass and scattered trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open marsh grasslands under an overcast sky. A large oak tree stands prominently on the left while distant trees line the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy marsh path with wooden fencing

events.description: rain begins to fall steadily from the overcast sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as rain falls steadily

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running parallel to the path on the right side
rocky outcropping visible on the right side of the marsh

segments.scene_description: Rain begins to fall as the character walks along the marsh path. A wooden fence appears on the right side, running parallel to the trail, while the large oak tree from the previous segment falls behind.

events.description: horse-drawn wagon passes by on the path moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking past the horse-drawn wagon as it moves along the path

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon moving along the path in the opposite direction, passing the character

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn wagon appears and passes by on the path, moving in the opposite direction through the rainy marsh. The wooden fence continues alongside the path but recedes into the distance as the character walks forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a marshland trail that shifts from a dry, overcast walk into a rainy encounter. It begins with the character traversing a dirt path through open grasslands, passing a prominent oak tree under a heavy, gray sky. As the character continues forward and the oak tree recedes, rain begins to fall and a wooden fence emerges on the right, running parallel to the trail. The scene then shifts as a horse-drawn wagon appears and passes by in the opposite direction through the downpour. Finally, the camera maintains its forward momentum as the wooden fence recedes into the distance of the rainy marsh.
